title: 'Patriot' second look sparks debate; Mammootty–Mohanlal poster splits fans; 'Looks AI generated'
description: The second-look poster for 'Patriot,' reuniting Mammootty and Mohanlal after 13 years, has ignited online debate. While the film's April 23, 2026 release date excited fans, many criticized the poster's visual quality, with accusations of AI generation dominating discussions. Some defended the design, while others lamented the perceived lack of star power in the artwork.

title: Industry Analyst Jeff Kagan Shares AI Secrets Ahead Of Keynote Speech

title: AI edge on EMI—India's skilling loans soar for a career push
description: Graduates and young professionals are borrowing up to ₹2 lakh to pursue AI courses, betting on faster career growth. NBFCs report rising demand, including from non-STEM candidates, with many opting for EMIs to fund upskilling as AI credentials become key to advancement, not just hiring.

title: Tusculum hosting summit on AI applications
description: GREENEVILLE — Individuals who are ready to embrace practical artificial intelligence will gain a greater understanding of this field and the ability to effectively and appropriately use it at the Appalachian AI Summit in March at Tusculum University.

title: AI safety hangs in balance as India rushes in
description: In the past two years, new nonprofit groups have emerged to address AI risks. Organisations like Fathom, Current AI, and IASEAI work with governments and industry to create safeguards. As AI spreads, safety is becoming a core concern, with researchers and policymakers joining efforts to manage its impact.
